# Updated: 2026-05-26 by CLAUDE_CODE (Opus 4.7 main-session orchestrator + Opus subagent executors via superpowers:subagent-driven-development; Area Boundary Map Drawing Editor shipped)

PHASE:        Area Boundary Map Drawing Editor shipped — DEFERRED bucket item 2 of 3 cleared.
              Second of three DEFERRED items from the 2026-05-23 Locked Task Queue is now in production on /patrol-areas.
              Replaces the raw-GeoJSON textarea + Polygon/LineString select in the Create + Edit dialogs with a
              visual click-to-draw editor over Esri satellite tiles via leaflet-geoman-free. Mirrors the Map Preview
              architecture (editor island + thin dialog swaps, dynamic import with ssr:false). Geometry is now
              in-place editable on Edit (drag vertices, drag whole shape, remove + redraw) — the prior
              "geometry locked after create — delete and recreate to change" design is superseded. Geometry type
              (Polygon vs LineString) remains locked at the editor level on edit; only the shape itself changes.
              feat/area-boundary-map-editor squash-merged + branch deleted.

              SOURCE CHANGES (7 NEW + 6 MODIFIED — 10 implementation commits squashed):
              NEW FILES:
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/lib/esri-tile-config.ts NEW — Shared constants: ESRI_TILE_URL + ESRI_TILE_ATTRIBUTION. Extracted from area-boundary-map.tsx during Task 1 so both the preview map and the new drawing editor consume the same tile source. Single source of truth — no string duplication.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/lib/leaflet-positions-to-geojson.ts NEW — Pure inverse of geojson-to-leaflet-positions.ts. Accepts the leaflet-geoman shape payload ({ kind: "Polygon" | "LineString", positions: [number,number][] or [number,number][][] }), flips [lat,lng]→[lng,lat], constructs a GeoJSON Geometry object (Polygon outer ring closed automatically; LineString preserved as ordered coords), validates ≥3 points for Polygon + ≥2 for LineString, returns null for malformed input. No deps on Leaflet runtime (consumes plain tuple arrays). Colocated under patrol-areas feature.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/lib/__tests__/leaflet-positions-to-geojson.test.ts NEW — Pure-function vitest coverage, 8 cases: Polygon flip + auto-close ring, LineString flip, Polygon with <3 distinct points (rejected), LineString with <2 points (rejected), already-closed Polygon ring (no double-close), non-finite coordinate values, missing kind/positions field, non-object input (null/undefined/string).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/area-boundary-editor.tsx NEW — Leaflet + leaflet-geoman editor island. "use client" Client Component, designed for dynamic import with ssr:false because Leaflet imports `window` at module-load. MapContainer + TileLayer (Esri World Imagery from shared esri-tile-config) + GeomanControl child that mounts pm.addControls on the map instance (Polygon + LineString draw modes only — Marker/CircleMarker/Rectangle/Circle disabled per Marine-Guardian geometry constraints). onShapeChange callback emits the current shape to the dialog on every pm:create + pm:edit + pm:remove event. Initial shape rehydration via pm.enableLayerEdit for Edit dialog. Stable callback ref pattern (Task 3 fix) prevents stale closures.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/area-boundary-editor.dynamic.tsx NEW — Shared next/dynamic ssr:false wrapper around area-boundary-editor.tsx. Extracted during pre-Task-5 cleanup so Create + Edit dialogs reuse one dynamic-import contract (V31 no-repeated-logic rule — extract on 2nd occurrence).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/area-boundary-editor.test.tsx NEW — jsdom vitest coverage of the editor island itself, 7 cases: editor mounts + renders 5 geoman control buttons, callback fires on pm:create with Polygon shape, callback fires on pm:create with LineString shape, callback fires on pm:edit (drag vertex), callback fires on pm:remove (clear), stable callback ref doesn't trigger stale-closure regression, initial-shape rehydration enables layer edit. react-leaflet + leaflet-geoman both mocked since vitest jsdom cannot render Leaflet canvas.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/_helpers/area-boundary-editor-stub.tsx NEW — Shared 5-button test stub for Create + Edit dialog tests. Extracted during pre-Task-5 cleanup (V31 no-repeated-logic). Buttons emit canned Polygon/LineString/empty/mismatched-Polygon/mismatched-LineString shapes via the onShapeChange prop so dialog tests can drive the editor without mounting Leaflet.

              MODIFIED FILES:
              - apps/web/package.json — added @geoman-io/leaflet-geoman-free@^2.19.3 dependency. Bundle impact: ~140KB gzipped, dynamic-imported so not in main bundle.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/area-boundary-map.tsx EDITED — now imports ESRI_TILE_URL + ESRI_TILE_ATTRIBUTION from shared esri-tile-config module instead of inline string literals. No behavior change.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/create-area-boundary-dialog.tsx EDITED — replaced raw-GeoJSON textarea + Polygon/LineString select with mounted AreaBoundaryEditor (via dynamic wrapper). Save button gated on validated shape present (disabled when editor reports null). handleSubmit null-guards the shape before tRPC call. Source select unwrapped from grid (incidental cleanup — was orphan child after geometry-type select removal).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/edit-area-boundary-dialog.tsx EDITED — locked-state UI REMOVED (the prior "geometry locked — delete and recreate" copy + disabled state). Now mounts AreaBoundaryEditor with the existing boundary's geometry rehydrated via initialShape prop. Defense-in-depth validation added on submit: re-runs leaflet-positions-to-geojson + verifies the resulting geometry type matches the original (Polygon stays Polygon, LineString stays LineString). Submit blocked + emerald error message shown if either check fails.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/create-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx EDITED — uses shared editor stub from _helpers. Restored shape-mismatch defense-in-depth tests (Task 4 fix). Save-disabled assertion added. Net delta: 0 (replaced textarea-driven cases with editor-driven cases; 16 cases total preserved).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/edit-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx EDITED — uses shared editor stub from _helpers. +4 new cases: editor mount with rehydrated initialShape, emit pipeline fires onShapeChange, clear-via-geoman blocks submit, mismatched-Polygon rejection, mismatched-LineString rejection (Task 5 fix-up). Plus Task 5 baseline +3 from stub-driven mount/save/cancel paths. Net delta: +5 cases.

              - Manual visual QA: DEFERRED to human (subagents have no browser access). Recommended human follow-up: open /patrol-areas as admin → Create → draw a polygon by clicking points on the satellite map → Save → Preview the new row to verify the shape persisted; then Edit it → drag a vertex → Save → re-Preview; repeat with LineString geometry.

              PRODUCT DECISION CAPTURED:
              - Edit dialog's prior "geometry locked after create" design is SUPERSEDED. Geometry is now in-place editable. Geometry type remains locked at the editor level (Polygon/LineString cannot be changed mid-edit — preserved from original create).
